Package shelter.service.impl

package shelter.service.impl
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    shelter.service
     
    shelter.service.model
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AdopterBasedMatchingService that aggregates scores from a configurable list of matching strategies to rank animals for a given adopter.
    AdopterServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AdopterService backed by an AdopterRepository.
    AdoptionServiceImpl
    Concrete implementation of AdoptionService that manages the full lifecycle of adoption requests.
    AnimalBasedMatchingServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AnimalBasedMatchingService that aggregates scores from a configurable list of matching strategies to rank adopters for a given animal.
    AnimalServiceImpl
    Default implementation of AnimalService backed by an AnimalRepository.
    AuditServiceImpl<T>
    Concrete implementation of AuditService that both prints a formatted log line to the console and persists each entry to the underlying AuditRepository.
    MockExplanationService
    A deterministic, non-AI implementation of ExplanationService used as the default placeholder until AIExplanationService is integrated.
    RequestNotificationServiceImpl
    Concrete implementation of RequestNotificationService that prints formatted notification messages to the console and maintains an in-memory record of all dispatched notifications for the duration of the current command execution.
    ShelterServiceImpl
    Default implementation of ShelterService backed by a ShelterRepository.
    StaffServiceImpl
    Default implementation of StaffService that loads a staff profile from a CSV file.
    TransferServiceImpl
    Concrete implementation of TransferService that orchestrates inter-shelter animal transfers.
    VaccinationServiceImpl
    Concrete implementation of VaccinationService that records vaccination events, checks overdue status against each vaccine type's validity period, and queries vaccination history by animal.
    VaccineTypeCatalogServiceImpl
    Default implementation of VaccineTypeCatalogService backed by a VaccineTypeRepository.
